instructions.summary: Submit VerdeDesk on AlternativeTo.net as an alternative to Portal das Financas — DR 80 backlink.
instructions.detail: AlternativeTo.net has DR 80 and millions of monthly visitors. People searching for alternatives to Portal das Financas will find VerdeDesk. The listing is free and typically approved in 1-2 days. This is a high-authority dofollow backlink.
instructions.exact_action:
Takes ~3 minutes:

1. Go to alternativeto.net and create a free account
2. Click 'Add Application' or go to alternativeto.net/software/new
3. Fill in:
   - Name: VerdeDesk
   - URL: https://verdedesk.vercel.app
   - Description: English-language interface for Portuguese freelancer tax compliance. Issue recibos verdes, track income, and stay compliant with Portuguese tax law — without needing to read Portuguese.
   - Category: Finance / Tax / Invoicing
   - Tags: portugal, freelancer, tax, invoicing, recibos verdes, expat
4. After creating, search for 'Portal das Financas' and suggest VerdeDesk as an alternative
instructions.unblocks: High-authority backlink on DR 80 domain indexed by Google. People searching for Portal das Financas alternatives will discover VerdeDesk.
